No data flows from untrusted sources into sensitive sinks. No anomalies or obfuscation. The confidence is high (1), malware score is 0, and security risk is 0.\n- **Verdict:** Accurate and reasonable.\n\n---\n\n**Report 2:**\n\n- **Summary:** Similar to above, describing the code as a standard factory for 'IUniswapV2Callee', with no malicious intent.\n- **Assessment:** The connect method uses external parameters ('address', 'signerOrProvider') but this is standard. No suspicious behavior or obfuscation.
